theme_and_archetype.vibe: The Modern Archive - Trustworthy, scholarly, refined, and highly legible. Relies on sharp typography, paper-like backgrounds, and distinct borders rather than soft shadows or generic gradients.

typography.pairing_strategy: Editorial Future (Classic Serif Headings + Geometric Sans Body)

headings.usage: H1, H2, Dashboard Titles, Thesis Titles, Hero Text

body.usage: Main application text, paragraphs, buttons, general UI

metadata.usage: Dates, Thesis IDs, Author tags, precise data points

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-none font-serif text-ink-black
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-serif text-ink-black
hierarchy_rules.special_instruction: Never use 'Inter' for headings. Never use bold sans-serif for massive titles. Let the Serif carry the emotional weight.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 extensively. Do not cramp elements.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Grid Borders pattern. Use `grid` with `border-collapse` style logic. Expose the skeleton. Dashboards should feel like highly structured archival catalogs.
layout_and_spacing.public_repository_grid: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical grid mixing span-2 and span-1 cards for visual interest. Mix large featured theses with standard list items.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Strictly minimal. Use `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm` (2px-4px max) to maintain the print/editorial rigidity. Avoid pill-shaped buttons or deeply rounded cards.

component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Solid dark background for primary, 1px solid border for secondary. Add 'group' classes to animate an arrow or underline on hover.
component_guidelines.cards: White background, `border border-black/10`, no drop shadows. On hover, apply a slight `-translate-y-0.5` and `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)]` for a brutalist/editorial pop.
component_guidelines.forms: Inputs must have a 1px solid border. Label text should be Serif or Mono. Use generous padding inside inputs (h-12). Focus state: `ring-1 ring-black border-black`.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky top bar with glassmorphism over the paper background: `backdrop-blur-md bg-[#FDFCF8]/80 border-b border-black/10`. Minimalist, text-heavy links.
component_guidelines.icons: Use `lucide-react`. Use stroke-width=1.5 for a delicate, refined look matching the serif typography. Preferred icons: book-open, archive, feather, file-text, library.
component_guidelines.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Custom styling: Sharp corners, white background, distinct border, close button in corner. Overlay should be `bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm`.

image_urls.description: Contemporary library with towering metal bookcases. Use for the public repository hero section with a black/30 overlay.
image_urls.placement_instructions: Place in the hero section of the public page. Must have `bg-black/40` or `bg-white/60` gradient overlay so the serif typography over it remains highly legible.

image_urls.description: Student deeply engaged in study at a library desk.
image_urls.placement_instructions: Use as the split-screen image on the Login/Signup page. Apply a subtle grayscale or sepia filter (`grayscale opacity-90`) to fit the scholarly mood.

image_urls.description: Inside of a large building with a glass roof.
image_urls.placement_instructions: Can be used for an 'About' section or as a banner image in the student dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent.global_css: Add `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');` to `index.css`. Set body font to IBM Plex Sans and `bg-[#FDFCF8]`.
instructions_to_main_agent.paper_texture: In index.css, add a class `.paper-noise { background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); }` and apply it to the main layout wrapper.
instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: Use React (.jsx files, NO TYPESCRIPT), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and lucide-react. Ensure `react-router-dom` is used for routing.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: You MUST add `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, status badges, links). Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="thesis-status-badge"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_components: When installing Shadcn components (button, card, dialog, input, label, badge, table, tabs), override the default border-radius in tailwind.config.js to `radius: '0rem'` or `0.125rem` to enforce the editorial sharp look.

anti_patterns: Do NOT use purple or teal gradients.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only use it for body if IBM Plex Sans fails.
Do NOT center everything. Use left-alignment for scholarly text.
Do NOT use soft, large drop shadows. Use hard 1px borders or solid black offset shadows.
Do NOT use generic rounded buttons. Use sharp or minimally rounded edges.
Do NOT use placeholders like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided image_urls.
